HGSS.494.0000:
Do you need anything?
I am the manager of the condominiums.\f
It’s pretty safe around here, so I
don’t have much to do.\f
I like to take my Pokémon out to
occupy myself.\f
...By the way, we have two
elevators here.\r
Don’t get confused.
HGSS.494.0004:
Please take this elevator
to go to the third floor.
